# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - api1.example.com
    - api2.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - external

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
    - db1.example.com
    - db2.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - external

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - api1.example.com
    - api2.example.com
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
        gateway: internet-gateway
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api1.example.com
            port:
              number: 80

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
    - db1.example.com
    - db2.example.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        source:
          namespaces: ["default"]
        destination:
          host: db1.example.com
          port: 
            number: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: db1.example.com
            port:
              number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  host: api1.example.com
  trafficPolicy:
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
